title: paraglycine pinnata
intro: Paraglycine pinnata, also known as Ginkgo biloba or Maidenhair tree, is a unique, ancient plant species native to China. It is a dioecious tree with a distinctive fan-shaped leaf and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to improve blood circulation and reduce oxidative stress. The plant's extracts have been found to have numerous health benefits, such as enhancing cognitive function, improving memory and concentration, and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. Paraglycine pinnata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, as well as being used topically in creams and ointments to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
